title: pinus ponderosa var. macrophylla
intro: Pinus ponderosa var. macrophylla, also known as the Ponderosa Pine or Bigcone Ponderosa Pine, is a variety of the Ponderosa Pine tree that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The resin of this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pinus ponderosa var. macrophylla include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
